reasoning: With the knowledge cutoff at May 22, 2025, only ~39 days remain until the July 1, 2025 resolution date. Databricks drastically reduced its need for near-term public market capital and employee liquidity by raising a massive $10B funding round in December 2024, followed by a $5.25B credit facility in January 2025. CEO Ali Ghodsi stated multiple times in late 2024 and early 2025 (most recently on Bloomberg in Feb 2025) that there is "not an extreme sense of urgency" for an IPO, floating late 2025 or 2026 as potential timetables. There is currently no active reporting of underwriter selections or confidential drafts in Q2 2025. Given the lack of recent momentum and the recent massive private capital injections, an official S-1 filing or formal announcement of IPO plans by July 1, 2025 is exceedingly unlikely.
